rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARION L. FRANCOIS LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Of Verified First Amended Petition For: (1) Appointment Of Successor Trustee; (2) Financial Abuse Of Elder; (3) Cancellation Of Deed; (4) Quiet Title; (5) Fraud; (6) Conversion; (7) Accounting; (8) Determination That Respondent Pre-Deceased Trustor; (9) Damages Pursuant To Probate Code Section 859.
rulings.Rulings: The Motion to Quash is denied. Respondent's counsel cites no autority reuqiring service of a civil summons in a proceeding brought under Probate Code section 850 that also includes civil claims. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, July 5, 2017.
